purpose: Bind authorization, execution, artifacts, verification, budget, and terminal state to one sanitized trace envelope.
invariants: All linked contracts in one trace must share trace_id, task_id, and agent_id.
A trace cannot report completed when a required failure action is unresolved.
Trace metadata may reference artifacts but cannot contain raw artifact contents.
A version drift resets trust; it never inherits the prior trust decision.
A cancelled task cannot leave runnable downstream work in the same trace.
